name: Salvador Shrimp in Fruit Sauce`
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cubed fresh or canned pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel shrimp, and devein if desired.
2. Cook shrimp in oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, stirring often, until pink. Remove from skillet; set aside.
3. Combine pineapple and next 5 ingredients in skillet. Mix vinegar and cornstarch until smooth; add to skillet. Bring to boil; cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
4. Add shrimp; reduce heat to low, and cook, stirring constantly, until heated through. Remove from heat; stir in cilantro. Serve over rice. Makes 6 servings.
